title: Weather Map
subtitle: 9-area weather data × map visualization (default today + tomorrow forecast)

whyDiffer.title: Why values differ from Windy
whyDiffer.intro: The two panels serve different purposes and are not meant for cell-by-cell comparison:
whyDiffer.source: Different source/model: left = per-area observations + numerical forecast; right = Windy's ECMWF continuous model.
whyDiffer.resolution: Different spatial resolution: left = 9 regional representative values; right = continuous-grid interpolation.
whyDiffer.time: Independent timelines: Windy uses its own time bar and may not match the left slider.

windyDisclaimer: Source: Windy.com (ECMWF model) | Windy's timeline is independent — use its bottom control bar

windyOverlay.label: Windy layer
windyOverlay.syncHintTooltip: Map field suggests Windy layer "{{overlay}}". Click to switch.
windyOverlay.noMatchTooltip: "{{field}}" has no direct Windy overlay — pick a related one manually
